subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1912-12-27 in London
subcodes.first_line: Though admonitions were given to both sides, though the right path was shown to them, and though they were warned about meddling from their neighbours
subcodes.first_line_orig: هر چه بطرفین نصیحت شد و راه صواب نموده و بمداخلهٴ همسایه‌ها انذار گشت
subcodes.subjects: @constitutional revolution in Iran, @growth of the Cause, @wisdom [hikmat], @non-participation in politics
